summary: Iteration 12 P2 cleanup verified end-to-end. Backend: 13/13 pytest in test_iter12_cleanup.py pass — models.py & rate_limit.py independently importable with all expected symbols (PilotRequestCreate/PilotRequest/BriefingGenerateRequest/BriefingPreview, check_pilot_rate/check_brief_pdf_rate/get_client_ip); legacy pilot intake 201s with request_type='pilot' default; diagnostic intake 201s and persists all 3 valid qualifier labels (org_scale_band/workforce_composition/current_vendor); qualifier allowlist correctly drops free-text / XSS / garbage values to None while accepting each canonical label; mixed valid+invalid only drops the invalid one; CR/LF in first_name/last_name/role does NOT 500 the endpoint; admin stats includes diagnostic_count; ?request_type=diagnostic filter works; public brief PDF still 200 application/pdf >100KB starting with %PDF; admin briefings preview (GET) requires X-Admin-Token (405 without token); admin briefings generate (POST) requires X-Admin-Token. Frontend: /catch-22 renders all 9 brief-section testids (summary/precedent/pattern/disclosure/enforcement/architecture/questions/diagnostic/sources); .trs-section-line count = 10 (> 5 expected); catch22-pdf-button present; catch22-cta-contact navigates to /diagnostic. /admin: 5 stat cards present (admin-stats with 5 children); 171 admin-type-<id8> Pilot/Diagnostic badges; BriefingDialog opens on Briefing trigger — for a request_type='diagnostic' lead the briefing-diagnostic-qualifiers panel IS shown with all 3 dd testids (orgscale='Under 1,000 employees', workforce='—' for an older diag without workforce set, vendor='Control Risks'); for a request_type='pilot' lead the panel is correctly NOT rendered. /, /memo, /diagnostic, /legal/{privacy,terms,cookies,imprint} all render without console errors. All 9 diagnostic form data-testids present.
critical_code_review_comments: Review-request says 'POST /api/admin/briefings/preview/{id}' but actual implementation is GET — minor doc/spec drift; behavior is correct & token-protected. Confirm intent (GET is more RESTful for a read-only preview).
_sanitize_qualifier allowlist now drops tampered values silently to None — good for UX but consider also logging a single WARN on drop so operators can spot scraper/abuse patterns.

CR/LF stripping is applied at the Resend subject construction (_strip_for_header) but the raw first_name/last_name with embedded CR/LF still gets PERSISTED to Mongo and rendered verbatim in the /admin table (visible in screenshot: row showing 'Alice Bcc:\nevil@example.com / Smith X-Hdr: x'). Suggest also stripping CR/LF (and HTML-escaping for safety) in the PilotRequest model on input, not just for the Resend header — defense in depth.

server.py is now ~830 lines even after extracting models + rate_limit. Recommend extracting (a) admin routes to routers/admin.py and (b) email/Resend helpers + PDF generation to services/ in the next pass.
test_credentials: ADMIN_TOKEN='dev-admin-trs-2026' from /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Used in /admin/login form and HTTP X-Admin-Token header.
seed_data_creation: Added ~10 TEST_I12_-prefixed leads via the 13 pytest cases (TEST_I12_Legacy, TEST_I12_DiagOK, TEST_I12_BadQual ×3, TEST_I12_AllowOK ×3, TEST_I12_Mix, TEST_I12_CRLF). Each used a unique TEST-NET-1 X-Forwarded-For IP in 198.51.100.0/24 to dodge the per-IP rate limiter (5/15min for pilot, 4/15min for brief-pdf). Total leads went from ~119 to 171. Several are now visible at top of /admin table with DIAGNOSTIC badges.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 review-request items verified at https://eu-travel-risk.preview.emergentagent.com. Key new test surfaces: (1) /app/backend/tests/test_iter12_cleanup.py covers allowlist + module-split + CRLF + smoke; (2) BriefingDialog conditional panel testid 'briefing-diagnostic-qualifiers' with child dd testids 'briefing-qualifier-{orgscale|workforce|vendor}' — only rendered when lead.request_type==='diagnostic'; (3) admin briefings/preview is GET (not POST as some docs say); (4) qualifier allowlist accepts ONLY exact-label strings (with the en-dash '–' in '1,000 – 5,000 employees' etc) — any other string silently becomes None at the persistence layer. Note: CR/LF in name fields persists raw to Mongo (only Resend subject is stripped) — see code review comment 3.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found in this iteration. Only spec drift noted: GET vs POST on /admin/briefings/preview (review request used POST; actual impl is GET — both correct, just inconsistent with the review spec).
